content: And is tinct recommended?
Ive got 10 protoparadise im trying to blow to help fill out teams for dtide
Winkle works at E0, wants E3. Jenkins is fine with E1, can go for E3/OE later on.
e3 winkle, depends on what you use jenkin for but she scales badly into endgame so most endgame use of jenkin is as a crit support where e0 is fine
but if you want to use subdps jenkin then e3
Tinct is dispel, reducing cards' cost, crit rate buff. Buffs crit dmg as well at E3. She is usually played with Kath.
I see, so e3 wink, e0 Jenk, and e3 tinct
Gotchya
Tinct is really good in w2 of this dtide
If you have Jenkins on a Castor team, you need at least E1.

Hello! Im new to the game and was tryign to understand time reversal in battles. Is it later that we are able to go back on turns or we have to pay real money for turns or actions rewind? Thanks!

it's good in some teams, depends, it's expensive to unlock and isn't necessarily much better than normal Ramona as a filler, also depends on where you are in your standard pulls farm. I'd say it's worth it after Titan blade +12, but I also unlocked it before that because of all the free standard pulls during the anniversary so ymmv
Do you have any of them?

rewind is only available if you have the premium battlepass(which is like the 2nd tier of paid battlepass), gives other stuff too but not available otherwise, can only do Retry Battle to restart the whole thing
I think you have to purchase the battle pass for that function
Ohh ok, that's weird every other gacha I play gives at least a couple rewind for free like SoC, mecharashi, czn or what not. Thanks for the clarification though!
well maybe they'll change it eventually, rewind was added pretty recently, like a month ago or so
Yeah because I guess they got inspired by CZN idk, but I like the SoC way, liek you get 3 rewinds, but battle pass gives you like 5 for exmaple
well also because they added replays this patch so I guess the tech was the same stuff
turn rewind is a paywalled feature, battle rewind is infinite and free
so its an in between, but if its recent they are probably testing it out
you can restart the battle from the beginning infinitely at no cost, even if you game over
right but I think they want specifically turn rewind so they don't have to replay the whole stuff
yeah, im used to turn rewind from other games haha, but i understand its new here
I find rewind to not be that important though, barely use it, and there's already a timegated tool for mistakes that's much stronger, the rez items, although they don't work for d-tide

Perfect fit for the wheel
the main issue I have with tawil wheel on kath is usually you'll want to spread the handsize wheel and that somewhat restricts your choices but well it's fine too

Horla is similar, provided you play Ultra Kath
Increase the Crit Rate, Crit DMG, Shield gain, HP heal, Aliemus gain, and STR gain of the wielder's Command Cards by 11/14/17/20%.
If the current realm is "Ultra": Activating Annihilation grants 110/140/17/200 Keyflare.
The first Posse activated during the Ultra Turn has its effect occur twice.
Did the devs go like "yeah whatever throw them all in"
it's cause Horla does all that herself
but the numbers are kinda low on Horla, for Kath with her big numbers on everything though that 20% is sick, plus crit rate+crit dmg is much better
Comparing it seems like horla wheel only gives one extra stat than tawil's
Hp
Heal
yeah but it's permanently at 20% even on the first card played, and it doesn't conflict with hand wheels otherwise so that's nice

the ultra stuff is good too, double posse on ultra turn means +2 arith +2 draw +60%temp dmg amp from Kath posse, big ultra turns
fully stacked is 30 crit and cdmg
but the downside is you spent 10 arith playing basic strike and defense
So 6% per stack
it's 5 cards, and you already often play a bunch of strike/defend to build up combustion for hyperflare anyway
it's 6% per stack
im talking about tawil e3
we were talking about tawil WHEEL E3
oh
There's 5 stacks, not 10
